entities.name: Problem Stack Model
entities.context: Framework suggesting professional maturity is defined by the abstraction layer at which one operates

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: AI-first platform that should build tools empowering coaches to act as strategists

entities.name: Strategic Judgment
entities.context: High-value skill that increases in worth as foundational labor becomes automated

entities.name: AI Automation
entities.context: Technology reducing cost of foundational labor (syntactic editing, basic checking) toward zero

entities.name: Foundational Labor
entities.context: Low-level tactical tasks like syntactic editing and basic checking that are being automated

entities.name: Complement Economics Principle
entities.context: Economic principle that when one component becomes cheap, the value of its complements increases

entities.name: Intent and Orchestration
entities.context: The abstraction layer where expertise value migrates as execution becomes automated

relationships.context: AI automation reduces the cost of foundational labor toward zero
Strategic judgment increases in value as its complement (foundational labor) becomes cheap
Higher positions in the problem stack correspond to strategic judgment over tactical execution
Careerspan is described as an AI-first platform building automation tools
Intent and orchestration represent the higher layer in the problem stack where value migrates
